title: Kerala on high alert as IMD issues red alert for 3 districts | Tap to know more | Inshorts - Inshorts
search_term: ("heat advisory" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat alert" OR "IMD warning" OR "IMD alert" OR "red alert" OR "orange alert" OR "yellow alert" OR "NDMA advisory" OR "cooling shelter" OR "relief measures" OR "heat compensation" OR "severe weather warning") Kerala
full_text: The IMD has issued a Red Alert for Kozhikode, Kannur and Kasaragod as extremely heavy rainfall exceeding 204.4 mm is expected within 24 hours. Orange Alerts are in place for Malappuram and Wayanad, while several other districts remain under Yellow Alert. Authorities have warned of flash floods, landslides, waterlogging and other rain-related hazards across Kerala.
